summary: Made surgical seam edits to distinguish the chapter opening from the adjacent object-led opening and to tighten the handoff into chapter 17's aftermath language.
edits: Reframed the opening around Elise's bodily experience of smoke instead of an object-led setup.
Specified that Lucien's cart heads east to align with the next chapter's opening reference.
Shifted the closing image to the masons' collective sealing work for cleaner continuity with the next chapter.
